description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-style chainsaw with a predominantly rust-red and metallic finish, featuring a robust rectangular body and a prominent toothed cutting chain along one edge. The body is constructed from heavy metal plates, with visible bolts and rivets, giving it a reinforced, utilitarian appearance. The cutting chain is lined with aggressive, angular teeth, and the chain bar is partially shielded by a metal guard. There are two main handles: a rear cylindrical grip and a side loop handle, both designed for secure two-handed operation. The surface is weathered, with scratches and signs of wear, suggesting frequent use in harsh environments. No visible brand logo or power source indicator is present, and the design emphasizes durability and functionality over aesthetics.
description: A heavy-duty, rust-red and metallic chainsaw with a reinforced body, aggressive toothed chain, and dual handles for secure grip. The surface is weathered and industrial, built for tough urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cutting chain, the main body, and both handles, with visible bolts and a spiked lower guard.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile of the chain bar and the alignment of the chain teeth along the edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chain, body, and handles, with additional surface details and wear marks.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the chainsaw, the base of the handles, and the end of the chain bar.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a rear cylindrical grip and a side loop handle, both robust and designed for two-handed use, with no visible ergonomic padding.
